eyebrow: my small, warm corner of the internet
heroLede: Psychologist by training, photographer by heart, and an operations specialist by day. This is where I keep my photographs, my thoughts, and the little things I'm loving lately.
aboutTitle: Loud, inappropriate, on the hunt for conversations and portraits
aboutBody: I spend my days untangling how people work and helping them run a little smoother. Off the clock, you'll usually find me chasing people I love with my camera, getting lost in a good book, or thinking about what would make me more money.
